title: Virtual property silently writes to nowhere
narrative: A developer added 'runningTotal' as a computed field for a paginated cart UI, marked it as TS-only via excludeFromSql. The ORM upsert flow doesn't strip excluded fields when the codegen drifts: every write to order.runningTotal is silently lost. The bug surfaces only when QA notices the running total resets to zero on page refresh.
